title: tricholaena dregeana
intro: Tricholaena dregeana, also known as Drege's grass, is a perennial grass species native to southern Africa. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Tricholaena dregeana include its potential to treat various ailments, such as fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues. The herbal preparation of Tricholaena dregeana is often made into a tea or infusion, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
